reason: Both answers reach the same correct conclusion (fix CI/CD, not architecture), correctly note 15 engineers is well within monolith range, cite Shopify/GitHub as counterexamples, and recommend modular monolith (Packwerk) before microservices, with extraction only for genuine scaling seams. Neither has factual errors. Differences are marginal: A names more concrete tooling (merge queue products) and extraction criteria examples; B gives a specific CI time target and is written in cleaner prose. These roughly offset, making this a genuine tie in decision-relevant quality.
